title: QuarryCraft Updated
description: Adds a Classic/Ender Quarry to Minecraft
body:
**Note:** This plugin is an updated version of the (discontinued) plugin [Quarrycraft](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/quarrycraft.72765/) by [Nullbyte001](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/authors/nullbyte001.689967/). It now gives support to Minecraft 1.17+ and has some additional features.

This is a showcase of the original plugin.

**Permissions** quarrycraft.use: (Default: true) Allows players to use quarries quarrycraft.useall: (Default: false) Allows players to use everyone's quarries quarrycraft.buildquarries: (Default: true) Allows players to create quarries **Some features:** Comatibility with WorldGuard and GriefPrevention. (You do not need WorldGuard or GriefPrevention to use this plugin) In the config you will find these options related to WorldGuard: do-worldguard-protection ( This can be true or false. Will determine whether or not you want quarries to consider protection from worldguard. Default: true) max-worldguard-y-check (Max height quarries will look at for WorldGuard protection. Default: 100) min-worldguard-y-check (Min height quarries will look at for WorldGuard protection. Default: 20). **Configurable Messages** Run the server at least once with the plugin installed, or type /quarrycraft reload to reload the config and messages files. This will generate the QuarryCraft/config and QuarryCraft/messages files. You can customise the plugin's messages by editing the QuarryCraft/messages.conf file. **Config** The QuarryCraft/config.conf file can be edited to change stuff like quarry size, enable/disable welcome messages, quarries per person limits etc. If you update to a new version, I suggest deleting the old config file before running to generate the newer config options if there are any. **QuarryCraft Guide** For a guide on how to build the quarry see [the page of the original plugin](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/quarrycraft.72765/). Note that the sentence: "Gold Blocks - Increases the efficiency of the quarry. Max is about 99% efficiency at 100 gold blocks." In this version it is: Netherite Blocks - Decreases the fuel usage of the quarry. Max is about 0,3% at 16 netherite blocks. **Terms (by Nullbyte)** You may not monetise this plugin! I made this plugin to be free. Do not claim that this is your plugin. If you make any modifications to this, give me credit for the original work. If you find any bugs, let me know! **Suggestions** I will gladly take your suggestions if I think it will be useful to a lot of people or if it makes sense. **Donations** If you really like this plugin then feel free to donate! Note that both links are donation links of the original author [Nullbyte001](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/authors/nullbyte001.689967/). **PayPal:** https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=SDUKCPPMZYLF8&source=url **BTC:** 1Dg9YLjigZXi6t7YRMhMmSYRghxZNmhsAK
